title: Apothecary Products 4 3/4" Stainless Steel Spatula and Blade, for Pills, Medicine, Vitamins
description:
BLADE SIZE: 4 3/4" L
DURABLE PLASTIC
INCLUDES: 1 spatula
BUILT TO LAST: Quality design, Built to withstand repeated use
HEALTHY LIVING: Apothecary Products helps to solve problems and work to improve wellness and health outcomes
reviews_5s: This spatula is well built. Excellent quality.Got these to use resin to make spatulas for my pharmacy staff. More expensive than I would’ve liked, but typical Apothecary Products tapered spatulas. You may be able to find cheaper options, but I knew what I was getting with these and opted to spend more to be assured of quality. I wasn’t disappointed.They don't have long spatulas at my store so I had to buy my own this is a good quality 🙂Excellent productSome people don’t like the hook, but it is my favorite. Opens sealed bottles, cuts, scrapes, etc… I keep one at the Parata, one in my pocket for use at the Fillmaster. And you can use for counting, of course. Way cheaper than price at Apothecary Products.These are a good price compared to the ones from lab supply companies. I use this almost every day and it works well and has held up well, even with frequent exposure to solvents.Soy técnico de farmacia y esta espátula es un éxito para contar medicamentos, la calidad del producto y el tamaño para mi está a otro nivelWe use this in our pharmacy, it’s great.It opens bottles foils and removes cotton and silica packets. Does the job everytimeworks as designed, slender and great for sorting and counting.
reviews_1s:
Overall get what you pay for:

Pros:
Nothing really

Cons:
Both arrived with wood handles split.
Once you remove the hook end from the cutout for it, doesnt seem to want to go back into place and stay. May stem from the fact handles wood was split.When you try to use the hook to get cotton out the hook flops down unless you hold it out which makes it hard to useI was so excited to see this item available. I searched for a spatula like this a few years ago with no success. My anticipation, however, was met with extreme disappointment. The cotton picker does not stay in place and flops all over when you try to count. I can only imagine how one would stab themself if not vigilant every single solitary time one picked up this tool. Save yourself the sorrow and choose something better.I used this type of spatula for years. I was so excited when I found it again. When I received and started using it I realized they made the handle and the metal part smaller. I’m a tall person but even my small coworkers say it’s too short in their hand.
I compared the size with my original one and it about 1.5cm shorter. What a cheap company.I bought this spatula for work (in the pharmacy) because it had a cotton puller inside it. However, you can't pull it out easily and quickly rendering it useless. Thumbs down. Now I'm on the lookout for a better one with the cotton puller tool.The little cotton thing at the end comes out way too easy and I poked myself a couple of times before taping it. If there was an easier was to take it off I’d be completely satisfiedDon’t like it. It’s smaller than the picture.Decepcionado con este producto en cuanto abrí el paquete me di cuenta que venia quebrado. Exijo un reembolsoNeeded a bit longer one so returned and bought 5"On the first day of use, the wood holding the hook on fell apart and the hook came off. Lost it. Spatula was good for counting but no longer with the hook which is why I bought this particular spatula. I threw it away.
